errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Use “Forgot password” to regain access to your account.
errors.totpCodeInvalid: The 6-digit code is incorrect or expired.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and Conditions and acknowledge the Privacy Notice.
errors.notMemberOfCommunity: Not a member of this community.
errors.tooManySignups: Too many sign-ups. Please try again later.
errors.tooManyLogins: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
errors.linkInvalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password needs at least {min} characters.
errors.nameTooShort: The name needs at least 2 characters.
errors.nameTooLong: The name is too long (max. 60 characters).
errors.codeInvalidRetry: The code is incorrect or expired. Please try again.
errors.codeInvalid: The code is incorrect or expired.
errors.verificationSendFailed: Sending failed. Please try again later.
errors.siteNameTaken: This site name is already taken. Please choose another.
errors.addressTaken: This address is taken. Please choose another.
errors.nameTaken: This name is already taken. Please choose another.
errors.ownerCantCancel: As the owner you can't cancel your own membership.
errors.noPaidMembership: You don't have a paid membership.
errors.stripeCancelFailed: Stripe cancellation failed. Please try again.
errors.defaultTierCantDelete: The default tier cannot be deleted.
errors.tierDeleteStripeBlocked: This tier can only be deleted after Stripe confirms that all linked subscriptions have ended. No data was deleted.
errors.memberRemoveStripeFailed: The Stripe subscription could not be ended safely. The member was not removed and no local access was deleted.
errors.tenantDeleteConfirmMismatch: The entered community slug does not match.
errors.tenantDeleteStripeSubscriptionsActive: The community can only be deleted after all Stripe subscriptions have ended. No data was deleted.
errors.tenantDeleteStripeCleanupFailed: Stripe or Connect cleanup failed. The community and its data were not deleted.
errors.paidTierArchivedInsteadOfDeleted: The paid tier was safely hidden instead of deleted so open Stripe payments can still be processed correctly.
errors.pendingPaymentsBlockDeletion: Deletion is blocked while pending payments or reservations exist. No data was deleted.
errors.productArchivedBecauseOrdersExist: The product was hidden instead of deleted because orders reference it. Pending payments can still be processed safely.
errors.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.alreadyMember: This person is already a member.
errors.uploadOneMedia: Please upload at least one image or video.
errors.validDomain: Please enter a valid domain (e.g. community.your-domain.com).
errors.contentRequired: Please provide content, an image or a video.
errors.titleTooLong160: The title is too long (max. 160 characters).
errors.titleTooLong120: The title is too long (max. 120 characters).
errors.validButtonUrl: Please enter a valid button URL (/path or https://…).
errors.countdownNeedsExpiry: The countdown needs an expiry date.
errors.uploadImageOrVideo: Please upload an image or video.
errors.validTargetUrl: Please enter a valid target URL (https://… or /path).
errors.validUrlPathOrHttp: Please enter a valid URL (https://… or /path).
errors.keyName: Please give the key a name (min. 2 characters).
errors.maxKeys: Maximum {max} active keys. Revoke an old one first.
errors.dayBetween: Please enter a day between 0 and 365.
errors.commissionRange: Please enter a commission between 0 and 50%.
errors.benefitsMax: The benefits may be at most 3,000 characters long.
errors.slugChars: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
errors.userOwnsCommunities: User owns {count} community(s) — delete or transfer those communities first.
errors.userHasLinkedData: User has linked data (orders/posts) and can’t be deleted.
errors.helpTitleTooShort: The title needs at least 2 characters.
errors.helpTitleTooLong: The title is too long (max. 80 characters).
errors.helpQuestionTooShort: The question needs at least 5 characters.
errors.helpQuestionTooLong: The question is too long (max. 200 characters).
errors.helpAnswerTooLong: The answer is too long (max. 8000 characters).
errors.subInvalid: Invalid subdomain. Use 3–63 characters: lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (not at the start or end).
errors.subReserved: This subdomain is reserved. Please choose another.

legalPurchase.immediateAccess: I request immediate access and understand that my right of withdrawal expires once digital delivery begins. <withdrawal>Details</withdrawal>.
legalPurchase.requiredError: Please confirm immediate access before continuing.

legalReview.title: Review the current terms
legalReview.description: Please review the current Terms and Conditions and Privacy Notice, then confirm before continuing.
legalReview.required: Please accept the Terms and Conditions and acknowledge the Privacy Notice.

billingSafety.creditsPausedText: Credit purchases and plan changes will return once verified payment processing is enabled.
billingSafety.leaveAfterPaidEnds: You can leave after Stripe confirms that the paid subscription has ended. This prevents recurring charges from being left behind.
billingSafety.activeSubscriptionError: An active paid subscription cannot be switched directly yet. Cancel the current subscription first; after it ends you can choose a new plan.
billingSafety.checkoutFailed: The secure checkout could not be started. Please try again.
billingSafety.creatorPlanCancelHint: Your plan remains active until the end of the paid period.
billingSafety.creatorPlanEnds: The plan ends on {date}. Included credits remain available until then.

basics.label: Basics
basics.title: What should your community be called?
basics.subtitle: Name and address — you can change both later.

brand.label: Branding
brand.title: Give it a look.
brand.subtitle: Description and colors shape the first impression.

spaces.label: Spaces
spaces.title: What should your community have?
spaces.subtitle: Pick the spaces. They are created right away and available immediately.

access.label: Membership
access.title: Access & membership.
access.subtitle: Decide who sees content and what the base membership is called.

review.label: Overview
review.title: All set?
review.subtitle: Review your details and get started.

onboarding.descPlaceholder: Describe in a few sentences what members can expect.
onboarding.tierHint: Every new member automatically gets this tier.
onboarding.publicDesc: Anyone can discover the community; individual spaces stay members-only.
onboarding.membersDesc: Content is only visible after joining.

spaceDesc.FEED: News and updates from the community.
spaceDesc.FORUM: Ask questions, share ideas and connect.
spaceDesc.BLOG: Articles and stories for your community.
spaceDesc.GALLERY: Image & video packages, free or for sale.
spaceDesc.PODCAST: Audio episodes to listen to — free or exclusive.
spaceDesc.LINKS: Curated links to everything that's you.
spaceDesc.ADS: Your own promo banners for the home page.

library.title: My library
library.subtitle: Your unlocked media and orders at {name}.
library.emptyHint: Purchased media packages and products appear here — available anytime.

help.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about Aera.
help.comingSoon: The help center is being built — check back soon.
help.resultsCount: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for “{query}”
help.contactText: Just get started — you'll find most answers right in your community or the creator dashboard.

account.profileText: Your profile picture and name apply to your entire account — across all communities.
account.joinFirst: You can set a profile photo once you've joined or created a community.
account.passwordText: Change your password — you'll stay signed in afterwards.
account.noMemberships: You're not in any community yet — <link>discover creators</link>.
account.subEndsPeriod: ends at the end of the period
account.creatorTextActive: Switch to the creator dashboard to manage your community.
account.creatorTextBecome: With the same account: your own spaces, memberships and revenue — under your brand.
account.name: Name
account.twoFaActiveDesc: When signing in, a code from your authenticator app is required in addition to your password.
account.twoFaSetupIntro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy …) and confirm with the code shown.
account.twoFaQrAlt: QR code for the authenticator app
account.twoFaNoScanner: No QR scanner? Enter the secret manually:
account.twoFaOffDesc: Protect your account with a second factor: when signing in, a 6-digit code from your authenticator app is required as well. Especially recommended if you run a community with payouts.
account.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not available on this device/browser.
account.pushDenied: Notifications are blocked in the browser. Allow them in your browser's site settings to enable them here.
account.pushDesc: Get push notifications on this device when someone reacts to your posts or comments — even when Aera isn't open.
account.newsletterActive: You are subscribed to this community's newsletter.
account.newsletterInactive: You are not currently receiving this community's newsletters.
account.newsletterSuppressed: Delivery to this address is paused. Please check your email address or contact support.
account.privacyText: Download a structured copy of your data. Account deletion is queued safely and only completed after billing and storage cleanup succeeds.
account.privacyDeleteHint: Enter your exact email address and password. Owned communities must be deleted first and pending payments must be resolved.
account.privacyDeleteBlockedPending: Resolve pending payments or reservations first.

communities.title: Communities
communities.subtitle: Manage all communities on the platform.
communities.emptyHint: Once creators create communities, they appear here.
communities.name: Name
communities.customDomainHint: Leave empty to remove the domain.
communities.statusHint: Suspended communities immediately become unavailable publicly and their dashboards are locked.
communities.dangerDesc: Permanently deletes the community with all members, content and orders. Enter the slug {slug} to confirm.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage all accounts on the platform.
users.emptyHint: Once users register, they appear here.
users.name: Name
users.resetHint: Generates a one-time link (valid for 1 hour) that lets the person set a new password.
users.dangerDesc: Permanently deletes the account. Community owners can’t be deleted.

media.title: Media
media.subtitle: Review and moderate all files uploaded to the platform.
media.emptyHint: Once files are uploaded, they appear here.
media.dangerDesc: Removes the file from delivery. Content that references it will no longer display the media.

posts.title: Posts
posts.subtitle: Review and moderate all posts on the platform.
posts.emptyHint: Once posts are created, they appear here.

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Manage all orders on the platform.
orders.emptyHint: Once purchases happen, they appear here.
orders.fulfilledHint: Marks the order as delivered or completed.
orders.dangerDesc: Permanently deletes the order from the database. Payments at Stripe remain untouched.

help.title: Help center
help.emptyHint: First create a category (e.g. “Getting started”), then the questions and answers within it.
help.noQuestions: No questions in this category yet.
help.subtitle: Help center
help.question: Question
help.questionPlaceholder: e.g. How do I create my community?

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: {count} logged actions — newest first.
audit.emptyHint: Administrative actions and important events are logged here.

index.creator: Creator
index.title: Your communities.
index.subtitle: Choose a community to manage — or start the next one.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.chatEmptyDesc: I can analyze your community, write text and perform actions like creating spaces.
assistant.imageEmptyDesc: Describe what you want to see. You can also upload images as templates — the assistant edits them or draws inspiration from them.
assistant.geminiOff: Google Gemini is not active — set a GEMINI_API_KEY under Settings → Integrations.
assistant.chatHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line. Actions apply directly to your community.
assistant.imgHint: Model: gemini-3.1-flash-image · Enter to generate · up to 4 templates (max. 5 MB each).
assistant.deleteDesc: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
assistant.requestProblem: There was a problem with the request.
assistant.imageProblem: There was a problem generating the image.
assistant.outOfCreditsImage: Your credit balance is used up. Open “Credits” above to buy a pack or switch to a larger one — then I can keep generating images right away.
assistant.mediaPickerEmpty: No images in your media library yet.

analysis.title: Analyze my community
analysis.prompt: Give me a short analysis of my community based on the current metrics.

createSpace.title: Create space
createSpace.prompt: Create a new chat space called Community Lounge for all members.

postIdeas.title: Post ideas for the week
postIdeas.prompt: Give me 5 concrete ideas for posts this week.

tierDesc.title: Tier description
tierDesc.prompt: Write a compelling description for a premium tier.

logo.title: Logo idea
logo.prompt: A minimalist, modern logo for my community – flat vector design, clean shapes, one symbol.

postImage.title: Post image
postImage.prompt: An atmospheric cover image for a post about motivation, warm colors, 16:9 landscape.

mockup.title: Product mockup
mockup.prompt: A clean mockup of an e-book on a bright desk, natural light, lots of whitespace.

mascot.title: Mascot
mascot.prompt: A friendly, illustrative mascot avatar for my community, round shapes, bold colors.

announcements.standaloneSubtitle: Banner management · this space is invisible to members.
announcements.heading: Announcement banners
announcements.headingDesc: Appear at the very top of all community pages — with colors, image, button and countdown.
announcements.onlyToggleHint: Hides the space from navigation and the community — this page then only shows the banner management.
announcements.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Upgrade now and keep your access
announcements.messagePlaceholder: e.g. Only until the end of the week
announcements.bgImageHint: Overlaid darkened with the background color so the text stays readable.
announcements.endsHint: After this the banner disappears automatically.
announcements.countdownHint: Live timer “7d : 9h : 12m” until the expiry date

spaceContent.manageDesc: You manage this space's content in the {label} area.
spaceContent.ppvPriceHint: From 1 cent the post is shown behind a paywall.
spaceContent.scheduleHint: If the time is in the future, the post appears only then.

chat.messagesDesc: The latest messages. You can remove inappropriate posts.
chat.emptyMessages: No messages in this chat yet.
chat.topicPlaceholder: e.g. Welcome! Stay friendly and on topic.
chat.topicHint: Shown pinned at the top of the chat. Leave empty to hide.
chat.whoCanPostHint: “Team only” makes the chat read-only for members.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Campaigns and audiences of your community.
newsletter.campaignsDesc: Segmented emails to members with an active newsletter opt-in.
newsletter.segmentsDesc: Audiences for campaigns — by tier or minimum points.
newsletter.emptySegmentsHint: Segments narrow recipients by tier or points.

ads.meta: {count, plural, one {# banner} other {# banners}} · {active} active
ads.rotateHint: The banners rotate in the ads section on your community home page. Enable the section under Layout → Page layout.
ads.emptyHint: Create your first banner with image or video, target link and display duration.
ads.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Spring sale in the shop
ads.recommendedSizeHint: This way the banner fills the ads section on the home page exactly. On mobile it's cropped centered to 2:1 (1280 × 640 px) — so keep logo and text in the center. At least 1200 px wide; videos in landscape too.
ads.targetHint: Where clicking the banner leads. Leave empty for a banner without a link.
ads.endsHint: After this the banner is hidden automatically.
ads.publishedHint: Only published banners appear in the rotation.

forumMod.author: Author
forumMod.customHtmlHint: Add custom HTML below the post. Scripts are removed for safety.
forumMod.subtitle: Manage posts and comments from all members.
forumMod.emptyTopics: No topics in the forum yet.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# course} other {# courses}} · structured learning content with lessons.
courses.confirmDeleteCourse: Delete the course “{title}” with all lessons?
courses.onlineHint: Upload a video or add a URL — optionally also a live stream.

gallery.emptyHint: Bundle images and videos like a folder – free to view or for sale.
gallery.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Behind the scenes – July shoot
gallery.addMediaHint: Newly uploaded media is added to the package.
gallery.sellOff: Free and visible to all members
gallery.availableUntilHint: After this time the package is hidden from the community.

blog.emptyHint: Write your first blog article with the editor.
blog.layoutHint: Magazine shows the newest post large, grid shows equal-size cards, list shows compact rows.

rte.gifNotConfigured: GIF search isn't set up yet.
rte.placeholder: Write your post… Use the bar above to format and insert media.
rte.recDenied: Camera access unavailable. Please allow access in your browser.
rte.recUnsupported: Video recording isn't supported in this browser.

live.subtitle: Schedule and control live streams and sessions.
live.streamHint: Embed link (e.g. YouTube/Twitch) or video URL.
live.entitlementHint: A key like tier:premium additionally restricts access.

requests.subtitle: Manage your members' wishes & custom requests.
requests.priceHint: With status "Priced" the member can pay.

links.emptyHint: Collect everything that belongs to you here — website, social profiles, projects.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · online and in-person.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Brand, integrations and domain of your community.
settings.activeNote: “Active” only means a key is configured. Test the real connection:
settings.stripeConnectDesc: Connect your Stripe account to receive payments. Platform fee: {percent}%.
settings.connectDone: Thanks! We received your details from Stripe. The status updates automatically.
settings.connectError: Stripe is not configured (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY missing) or the connection failed.
settings.disconnectBlocked: Stripe could not be disconnected safely. End all subscriptions first and make sure the Connect account has no outstanding balance or other obligations.
settings.needsSecretKey: To connect, the platform must have a STRIPE_SECRET_KEY configured.
settings.redirectNote: You'll be securely redirected to Stripe to set up your account.

branding.heading: Branding
branding.desc: Logo, name and colors of your community.
branding.logoHint: PNG or JPG, square, at least 256 × 256 px.
branding.categoryHint: Determines the topic your community appears under on the discover page.

domain.heading: Address & domain
domain.cnameHint: Then set up a CNAME record pointing to {rootDomain}.
domain.dnsIntro: Set up one of the two DNS records:
domain.dnsWait: Then “Check now” — DNS changes can sometimes take up to an hour.
domain.subHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only (3–63 characters). Your community will be reachable at this address. Leave empty for the default (your handle).

danger.heading: Danger zone
danger.deleteDesc: Irreversibly removes all members, spaces, content and orders.

developers.title: Developers & API
developers.subtitle: Connect Aera with your tools: read-only REST API and signed webhooks.
developers.apiKeysDesc: Read-only access to your community data: {members}, {orders}, {subs} — auth via {auth}.
developers.newKeyTitle: Your new API key — copy it now, it won't be shown again:
developers.keysEmptyHint: Create a key to fetch members, orders and subscriptions via API.
developers.webhooksDesc: Aera calls your URL on events (e.g. new member → CRM). Every delivery is signed via HMAC-SHA256 (header Aera-Signature).
developers.webhooksEmptyHint: Connect your CRM, accounting or Zapier/Make via webhook endpoints.

export.title: Data export
export.subtitle: Your data belongs to you — export it anytime, filtered to your tenant.
export.fullExportDesc: A JSON package with all {count} records: members, orders, subscriptions, entitlements, posts, comments, products, courses, events, newsletters and segments.
export.footer: All exports are strictly limited to your community and require admin rights. Email addresses are only included in the member export.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.subtitleAi: New posts and comments are automatically checked by AI — your team makes the decisions.
moderation.subtitleHeuristic: New posts and comments are checked by heuristics (with a Gemini key: AI classification).
moderation.emptyHint: There is currently no reported content. Auto-flags of new posts and comments appear here.

layout.nameUpdateHint: This updates your name everywhere in the community.
layout.coverApplied: The cover image is applied immediately.
layout.noSocials: No links yet. Choose a platform above.
layout.sectionsHint: Drag sections to reorder them. Use the eye button to hide them. This arrangement applies only to the selected audience.
layout.noSections: No sections visible. Add some below.
layout.navHint: Add menu items to your community's sidebar, reorder them by drag & drop or remove them.
layout.chooseSpaceHint: Link one of your space pages. Its visibility is shown next to it.
layout.recentlyVisitedInfo: Automatically shows each member the pages of your community they visited most recently — right in the expanded sidebar. No target needs to be chosen.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Revenue, members, engagement, courses and newsletters at a glance.
analytics.mrrHint: {count, plural, one {# active subscription} other {# active subscriptions}}
analytics.revenue30dHint: {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} · total {total}

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.subtitle: Points rules, badges and leaderboard for your community.
gamification.rulesDesc: Set how many points an action awards.
gamification.rulesEmptyHint: Add a points rule for an action.
gamification.leaderboardDesc: The most active members of your community.
gamification.lbEmptyHint: Once members become active, they appear here.
gamification.triggerHint: The action that awards points. Multiple rules per trigger add up.

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.subtitle: Members refer members: every member finds their invite link on the community's members page.
referrals.commissionNote: Payout to members is handled by you.
referrals.provisionDesc: The share of revenue referring members receive when someone they referred makes a purchase. 0% = points only (gamification trigger “Referral”), no money.
referrals.emptyHint: Once members share their invite link and someone joins, it appears here.
referrals.convPurchase: {referrer} earns commission for a purchase by {referred}

automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: Onboarding series: automatic emails X days after joining — only to verified addresses.
automations.cronWarning: Note: set CRON_SECRET and set up an hourly scheduler on /api/cron/automations so the series gets sent.
automations.cronWarningNoEmail: Without RESEND_API_KEY, emails are only logged.
automations.bodyPlaceholder:
Hi {nameVar},

great to have you here! …
automations.emptyHint: For example, add a welcome email (day 0) and a tip after a week (day 7).

tiers.title: Memberships
tiers.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# membership} other {# memberships}} · how they appear on your join page.
tiers.stripeWarning: Stripe isn't connected yet — free tiers work right away; for paid tiers add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY to your .env.
tiers.coverHint: Appears at the top of the card on the join page. Recommended 1200 × 400 px.
tiers.benefitsPlaceholder:
All videos ad-free
Exclusive community chat
10% off in the shop
tiers.benefitsHint: One line per benefit — shown on the join page as a checklist.
tiers.recommendedHint: Highlights this membership on the join page (max. one).
tiers.defaultHintInactive: Set as the default for new members.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}} · digital products, bundles and access.
products.stripeWarning: Without a Stripe key, purchases are recorded manually — for real payments add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.
products.emptyText: Create your first product to sell.
products.publishedHint: Visible and purchasable in the community.

payouts.title: Sales
payouts.subtitle: Your revenue, payouts and invoices at a glance.
payouts.stripeWarning: Stripe isn't connected — purchases are recorded as paid in dev mode. Connect Stripe Connect under Branding to receive real payouts.
payouts.payoutDevNote: In test mode, purchases are recorded as paid instantly. Connect Stripe to pay real money out to your account.
payouts.payoutConnectNote: Connect Stripe to have your earnings paid out to your bank account.
payouts.payoutReadyNote: Your balance is paid out to your bank account automatically by Stripe.
payouts.payoutPendingNote: Finish your Stripe setup to receive payouts.
payouts.invoicesFromAeraHint: Platform fees and AI credits you purchased.
payouts.receiptsHint: Payment receipts for your members' completed purchases.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}} in your community.
members.allEmptyHint: Add your first member or share the join link.
members.teamDesc: Owners, admins and moderators of this community.
members.teamEmptyHint: Promote members to moderators or admins to share the workload.
members.bannedDesc: Banned accounts have no access to the community.
members.bannedEmptyHint: Banned members appear here and can be reactivated.
members.addSubtitle: Invite to the community by email
members.inviteCreated: Member created. Share this invite link — it lets the person set their password and activate their account (valid for 7 days).
members.inviteEmailNote: If email sending is configured, the invitation was also sent by email.
members.emailHint: If no account exists yet, one is created automatically.
members.emailDisabledHint: Your email address is your login and can't be changed here.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# active space} other {# active spaces}} · rooms for content and exchange.
spaces.emptyText: Create your first space to organize content.
spaces.entitlementHint: Leave empty to accept any paid membership.
spaces.deleteConfirmText: “{name}” will be permanently deleted. All content inside is lost — this cannot be undone.

overview.title: Overview
overview.welcome: Welcome back. Here's the pulse of {name}.

upgrade.title: More room for your community
upgrade.description: Move to a paid plan for more monthly AI credits and storage.

overview.noMembers: No members yet. Share your community link to get started.

subscription.title: My subscription
subscription.switchText: Compare all plans on the join page.
subscription.cancelledNoticeUntil: Your membership has been cancelled — your access stays until the end of the paid period.
subscription.ownerNote: As the owner you can't cancel your own membership. You can delete or transfer the community in the settings.
subscription.cancelText: Your access to paid content ends with the paid period. Purchased products remain yours.
subscription.leaveText: You'll lose access to members' content. Purchased products remain yours.

credits.title: Credits & usage
credits.subtitle: AI assistant
credits.noUsage: No usage in this period yet.

media.title: Media
media.subtitle: All uploads from every area of your community
media.emptyHint: Uploads from gallery, feed, products, courses and more appear here.
media.folderEmpty: Drop media here or move it from the menu.
media.confirmDeleteFolder: Delete this folder? Media inside will become unfiled.
media.confirmDeleteMedia: Really delete this media? It will no longer be reachable.
media.name: Name
media.dangerDesc: Deletes the library entry. Linked content may show a broken media URL.

mediaStudio.title: Image Studio
mediaStudio.subtitle: Create, edit and refine images with AI
mediaStudio.aiOff: AI is not configured (GEMINI_API_KEY missing). Only Resize is available.
mediaStudio.fromLibraryHint: Pick an image from your media library
mediaStudio.libraryEmpty: No images in your library yet.
mediaStudio.hint_remove-bg: One click: the subject is cut out onto a transparent background.
mediaStudio.hint_enhance: One click: sharper details, less noise, better exposure.
mediaStudio.promptCreatePlaceholder: e.g. Minimal poster of a coffee cup, warm morning light
mediaStudio.promptEditPlaceholder: e.g. Make the sky sunset orange, keep everything else
mediaStudio.emptyCreate: Describe your image below — or start from an existing one
mediaStudio.emptyPick: Add an image to work on
mediaStudio.emptyHint: Upload a file or pick one from your library
mediaStudio.historySaved: All results are saved to your media library automatically.
mediaStudio.errorLoad: The image could not be loaded.
mediaStudio.errorCredits: No credits left — top up in Credits & usage.
mediaStudio.errorNoImage: No image came back. Try rephrasing your request.
mediaStudio.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tips.subtitle: Tips your members have sent
tips.goalHint: Shown as a progress bar on the tips wall.
tips.emptyHint: When members send tips, they'll appear here.

stories.subtitle: Ephemeral posts that disappear after a set time
stories.emptyHint: Add a photo or short video that expires automatically.
stories.defaultTtlHint: How long new stories stay visible (1–168).
stories.autoplayHint: Advances to the next story in fullscreen.

planner.title: Content planner
planner.subtitle: Plan posts, videos, streams and more.
planner.scheduleHint: Optional — when it should go out.
planner.pickerSubtitle: Pick an image from your library

auth.name: Name
auth.totpHint: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
auth.legalAcceptance: I accept the <terms>Terms and Conditions</terms> and acknowledge the <privacy>Privacy Notice</privacy>.
auth.newsletterOptInLabel: I would like to receive news and offers from this community by email.
auth.newsletterOptInHint: Optional. You can change your choice at any time in your account or through the unsubscribe link in every email.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe from newsletter

discover.title: Discover.
discover.resultsFor: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} for “{query}”
discover.emptyText: Try a different term — or start your own community.
discover.bannerText: Launch your own community with memberships, courses, events and a shop in minutes — under your brand.

features.intro: From the first discussion to a scaling membership business — everything under your brand, nothing in third-party tools.

s1.title: Your own community, your brand
s1.text: Your community runs under your name, your logo and your colors — with its own web address and a look you decide. You define who holds which role: from regular members to moderators and administrators.

s2.title: Spaces for everything you do
s2.text: Set up as many spaces as you need: a feed for news, a forum for discussions, courses, a shop, newsletters, events, a blog, a knowledge base, image galleries, a video library, chat, podcast, a link collection and your own ad slots. For every space you decide whether it's visible to everyone, members only, or paying members only.

s3.title: Posts, comments & reactions
s3.text: Share posts with text, images and media. Your members comment, react with one click and join the discussion. Show important announcements as a prominent banner at the top so nobody misses them.

s4.title: Memberships & payments
s4.text: Offer free and paid memberships — monthly, yearly or as a one-time purchase. Sell digital products and whole bundles. Payments run securely, paid content unlocks automatically after purchase, and your earnings are paid out to you.

s5.title: Courses & events
s5.text: Create online courses with individual lessons — every member sees their own progress. Plan events and let your members RSVP. Courses and events can be free or paid, without any extra tool.

s6.title: Newsletters & emails
s6.text: Send newsletters to everyone or to specific groups — for example only to paying or especially active members. You see exactly how many emails arrive, get opened and clicked.

s7.title: Chat, messages & live
s7.text: Your members message each other directly or exchange ideas in group chats. For shared moments in real time there are live sessions everyone can join.

s8.title: Media library: images, videos & podcast
s8.text: Show images in galleries, provide videos in your own library and publish podcast episodes with a built-in player. Media, too, can be freely accessible or reserved for paying members.

s9.title: Rewards & motivation
s9.text: Award points for activity, set up levels and badges and show a leaderboard. That keeps your members motivated and engaged — you decide what earns points.

s10.title: Your AI assistant
s10.text: An assistant supports you right in the admin area with ideas and copy. Your members get fitting recommendations from your posts, courses and products. The assistant only knows your community — nothing from others.

s11.title: Manage members
s11.text: Keep track of all members, invite new ones by invitation, assign roles and moderate when needed — from approving new members to banning if it ever becomes necessary.

s12.title: Get discovered
s12.text: Alongside your own community there's a Discover page where visitors find new communities by topic — one more way for new members to reach you.

s13.title: Your data belongs to you
s13.text: Download all of your community's data at any time — members, content and orders. Every community is cleanly separated and protected from all others. No lock-in, no data mess.

authPages.loginText: Log in to get to your communities.
authPages.signupText: Join your favorite creators' communities — and start your own anytime later.
authPages.signupCreatorText: After signing up you'll go straight into the onboarding of your own community.
authPages.forgotText: Enter your email address — we'll send you a reset link.
authPages.forgotSent: If an account with this email exists, we've sent you a reset link. Also check your spam folder.

pricing.intro: Every plan includes a monthly credit allowance for the AI assistant in your dashboard. Switch anytime — your allowance resets automatically every month.
pricing.topupText: Need more in between? Purchased credits never expire and are only used after your monthly allowance.
pricing.footnote: 1 credit equals roughly 1,000 tokens; a typical assistant request costs 1–3 credits. Platform fees on your community revenue are billed separately — only on real revenue.

marketing.footerAbout: The platform for creators who run community, memberships, courses, events, newsletters and commerce under their own brand — with full data ownership.
marketing.footerTagline: Your community. Your brand. Your business.

home.heroText: Aera unites spaces, memberships, courses, events, newsletters and a shop under your own brand — with one login, one checkout and one dashboard.
home.statementText: No algorithm between you and your members, no tool sprawl of community app, course platform, mail tool and shop. One platform that belongs to your brand — down to exporting all your data.

c1.title: Spaces for everything you do
c1.text: Feed, forum, blog and knowledge base, image galleries, video library and podcast, plus chat, link collection and your own ad slots. Every space can be open to everyone, members-only or for paying members only — and each one supports comments and reactions.

c2.title: Memberships that pay off
c2.text: Free and paid memberships, subscriptions, one-time purchases and digital products. Payments run securely, paid content unlocks automatically after purchase — and your earnings are paid out to you.

c3.title: Courses, events and newsletters
c3.text: Online courses with lessons and individual progress for every member, events with RSVPs, and newsletters to targeted groups — with an overview of delivery, opens and clicks.

c4.title: Chat, messages and live
c4.text: Private messages between members, group chats and live sessions for direct real-time exchange — all inside your community, no extra app required.

c5.title: Studio, media storage and AI
c5.text: Create and edit images right inside Aera: new visuals from a description, cut out backgrounds, boost quality, adjust formats — with AI, no extra program. Every upload from every space gathers in your media storage, neatly organized in folders. And an AI assistant helps you with copy and ideas.

c6.title: Motivation that keeps them active
c6.text: Points, levels, badges and a leaderboard keep your members engaged. Everyone gets fitting recommendations from your community — more activity, without any outside algorithm.

c7.title: Everything under your brand
c7.text: Your own logo, your own colors, your own address and a layout you decide. Manage your members at a glance, invite new ones by invitation — and new people discover you via the Discover page.

home.revenueText: Payments run securely, and paid content unlocks automatically right after purchase. One fair fee — only on real revenue.

brand.title: Your brand.
brand.text: You decide your community's logo, colors and layout. Aera stays infrastructure in the background — no foreign platform feel.

address.title: Your address.
address.text: Every community has its own web address, and a custom domain is ready to go. Your members come to you, not to us.

data.title: Your data.
data.text: Download all of your community's data at any time — members, content and orders. Every community is cleanly separated and protected from all others.

home.finaleText: Start for free, set up spaces, invite members — monetize when you're ready. No credit card required.

auth.manifestDescription: Your communities: posts, courses, events, and messages — all in one place.

emails.fallbackLink: If the button does not work:

emails.resetHint: The link is valid for 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.
